imageAlt: Ecosystem - in app promotions roadmap item preview image
title: Ecosystem - in app promotions
summaryBody: We will impact (MTD) awareness and FA usage by highlighting the ecosystem features to FreeAgent customers with a NWG-subsidised account, specifically focusing on the tax timeline and invoicing capabilities within the FreeAgent app.
detailBody: We will impact (MTD) awareness and FA usage by highlighting the ecosystem features to FreeAgent customers with a NWG-subsidised account, specifically focusing on the tax timeline and invoicing capabilities within the FreeAgent app.
